about: Antigravity Claude Proxy - Anthropic-compatible API backed by Antigravity Cloud Code for Claude/Gemini models

OAUTH_MODE.description: OAuth mode: 'manual' (copy callback URL) or 'external' (custom redirect URI)

default.install: apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git curl ca-certificates && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* && bash /code/install.sh
